title: FSang18's Mighty Morphin'
description: FSang18's Mighty Morphin' brings the Original 6 Mighty Morphin' Power Rangers and the White Ranger into Minecraft as a Palladium addonpack!
body:
FSang18's Mighty Morphin' brings the Original 6 Mighty Morphin' Power Rangers and the White Ranger into Minecraft as a Palladium addonpack!


To begin, you'll need to craft a Standard Morpher using the recipe below:
![morpher top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ce7745b9b513d4d6073708ef3571e76552e88ea.png)
![morpher bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/665bacc9c3ccf83abf489124a54de142c1fb63e4.png)
![morpher_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/682227bc3f9416fc679e2fdb09035c358483cd22.png)

**Once you have that, you can begin searching for your Power coins! In Deserts, and Badlands Biome, there is a chance of a Comand Center spawning with one of the 5 Original Ranger Power coins hidden within it:**
![Command Center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0d6d794b44343e8f3eb8281c8f14361dae42afc.png)

**For the Green Power Coin, you'll need to search in Soul Sand Biomes and Warped Forest Biomes in the Nether for a chance of the Temple of Repulsa spawning with a chance of a Green Ranger Power coin hidden within it:**
![Temple of Repulsa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef14735f1e807dcae1dc2bdf56e19e20848f0861.png)

**For the White Power Coin, you'll need to search in The Outer End for a chance of the White Ranger Alter spawning with a chance of the White Ranger statue to be holding a White Light. This can be used to craft the White Ranger Power Coin:**

![Temple of White Light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/864955e3a46f547058325d07c5403ce2cf92adc5.png)

**For the Drakkon Power Coin, you'll need to combine a Green Ranger Power coin with a White Ranger power coin in a Smithing table using a Silence Armor Trim to create the Drakkon Power Coin:**

![Drakkon Coin Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d7852e640704df2da71a02394b220e727802aa7.png)

Once your Morpher has a coin in it, you can equip it to the curios:belt (FORGE) or trinkets:legs/belt (FABRIC) to utilize the powers.

Crouch + Right Clicking an Empty Morpher in your mainhand with a Power Coin in your offhand will place the coin into the morpher (the same process with an empty offhand can be used to remove the coins).

![red_coin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7961064c4c589ea4524b7e5c942852207c3b10c.png) + ![empty morpher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9265636611257cc79fb600018837898b0c47471c.png) = ![red morpher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dcfeb0928f8dc33302e67c7d5f04ae4ffd37686.png)

There are 2 ways you can Level up your Ranger:

You will gain +1 XP point every 5 seconds that you are transformed
You can Gain +3 XP (+5 XP for the White Ranger) everytime you deal damage to an entity while you are transformed.

Once you hit 300 XP, you will be awarded 1 Skill Point for the current ranger you are training as.
You can see your current Skill Points in the bottom right corner, next to your ability bar:

![Skill Point HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8333ab5a3bb9be221f3cb9bd8074fa1003598e8c.png)

Skill points cannot be gained past 99, so once you hit that, you'll need to spend your Skill points to gain more.


To Obtain a Dragon Shield / Gold Morpher, you need to level up as a Green Ranger to purchase the following skill which can remove the Dragon Shield Token from your morpher, turning it silver, and allowing you to combine it with any morpher using the same Crouch + Right click method as placing a normal Power coin into the Morpher:

![Dragon Shield Removeal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ecf8e4bf51c19b134950a30a380ef21c1883458.png)

Equipping the Dragon Shield will grant a Strength / Armor / Health boost while transformed to your equipped ranger.



If you lose, or want to replace your Dragon Shield, the following skill can be purchase for a high Skill Point Cost to replace it on your Green Ranger, granting you a Gold Morpher once again:

![Dragon Shield Add](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8c8220d46f2ea9ab4a39c0ddd019b5a15f5fc00.png)

Master Morpher:

To obtain the Master Morpher, you will need to craft it using the following recipe which includes x1 Dragon Shield Token, x4 Gold Morphers (Empty) and x4 of any Power Coins except Lord Drakkon's coin:
![Master morpher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15314f05b2fc05c14660d09e8ba7ecd586f39d26.png)
With the Master Morpher, you can load any coins except Lord Drakkon's coin to be able to seamlessly shift between forms, and even grow your Attack, Health and Armor stats even higher than normal!

Using the Palladium accessories, you can customize a few options for your ranger, you can access it from the following menu:
![Accessories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c8ed9ad699b5b43e9957fe08d3630d898206b3.png)
Then use the following options as desired:
![Accessory Options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513e4b60762b3f42e9b85ca096ba6c52a3c29c88.png)![Accessories Activated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a55f3d92519c9bea84e1b45e7993d39db5c37426.png)

There is also support for slim model suits & Right / Left main hand selection!



The 5th slot is empty for now, but there are plans to a add ZORDS to this in the future!



HUGE Shoutout to Atrox for Designing all of the Ranger suits! Check them out here for commission requests: https://www.patreon.com/c/ATROXbyKaan/posts
